name: Wild West RP
description:
Wild West RPG where you can roleplay as anything you want, an outlaw, a lawman, bounty hunter or just an Civilian. Do as you want and go rob that bank or catch that criminal!

It is the year 1879 in the lands of America. You will chose your name, gender, age, appearance, job and if you wish your scenario!

This is my first public bot so i hope yall enjoy it! :)))

(Picture is from pinterest, by Summer Kozisek)
creator: Lingonberry
